# No End Flash!

<p align="center" style="display: block">
    <img src="https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qgAML14g/6cdc0a6902cba3f9af011dfb148e118f42bda2bf_96.webp" width="100">

![No-End-Flash!](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?labelColor=black&color=grey&label=&suffix=%20downloads&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/no-end-flash!&style=flat&logo=data:image/png;base64,)
![No-End-Flash!](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/no-end-flash!?label="latest%20mod%20version")
![No-End-Flash!](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/no-end-flash!?label="latest%20game%20version")

No-End-Flash is a simple, client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft that disables the purple lightning visual effect, often referred to as the "End flash".

## Installation

This is a client-side mod and only needs to be installed on the client.

1.  Ensure you have the [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) installed.
2.  Download the latest version of the mod from any source.
3.  Place the downloaded `.jar` file into your `.minecraft/mods` folder.
4.  Launch the game.

## Usage

You can toggle End Flashes using the command `/noendflash`.

Available arguments:\
    1. Raw command - Help information
    2. status - Current End Flashes status
    3. toggle - Toggle End Flashes (how obvious, isnt it?)
